news.title:
Puravankara MD affirms input cost pressures are under control.
Margins are anticipated to remain stable, as per the MD.
news.summary:
Puravankara MD affirms input cost pressures are under control.
Margins are anticipated to remain stable, as per the MD.

news.title:
Puravankara plans to launch 33 mn sq ft of homes in 2.5 years.
Estimated revenue from these launches is ₹35,636 crore, per MD Ashish Puravankara.
news.summary:
Puravankara plans to launch 33 mn sq ft of homes in 2.5 years.
Estimated revenue from these launches is ₹35,636 crore, per MD Ashish Puravankara.

news.title:
Puravankara shares rose 8% after unveiling a ₹55,000 crore project pipeline with 30 projects across South India and Mumbai.
The developments span 51.14M sq ft; company reported ₹3,859 crore pre-sales in 9M FY26, reflecting strong demand.
news.summary:
Puravankara shares rose 8% after unveiling a ₹55,000 crore project pipeline with 30 projects across South India and Mumbai.
The developments span 51.14M sq ft; company reported ₹3,859 crore pre-sales in 9M FY26, reflecting strong demand.

news.title:
Puravankara plans 30 new projects in South India, Mumbai, targeting ₹55,000 cr GDV in 24 months.
The company aims to plant 1M trees by 2030 under WEF's 1t.org initiative.
news.summary:
Puravankara plans 30 new projects in South India, Mumbai, targeting ₹55,000 cr GDV in 24 months.
The company aims to plant 1M trees by 2030 under WEF's 1t.org initiative.

news.title:
Puravankara Ltd reappoints Mr. Ashish Ravi Puravankara as MD from April 2026 to March 2031.
Shareholders approved his reappointment and remuneration adjustments via postal ballot on March 19, 2026.
news.summary:
Puravankara Ltd reappoints Mr. Ashish Ravi Puravankara as MD from April 2026 to March 2031.
Shareholders approved his reappointment and remuneration adjustments via postal ballot on March 19, 2026.

news.title: Puravankara's subsidiary secures Maharera registration for Tower D in Purva Panorama.
news.summary: Puravankara's subsidiary secures Maharera registration for Tower D in Purva Panorama.

news.title:
Puravankara Ltd issued a Rs. 50-cr corporate guarantee for its subsidiary Starworth Infrastructure.
The guarantee, in favor of SBM Bank, supports equipment/material purchases and is a contingent liability.
news.summary:
Puravankara Ltd issued a Rs. 50-cr corporate guarantee for its subsidiary Starworth Infrastructure.
The guarantee, in favor of SBM Bank, supports equipment/material purchases and is a contingent liability.

news.title: Puravankara secures a construction contract worth ₹280 crore from Vellore Institute of Technology.
news.summary: Puravankara secures a construction contract worth ₹280 crore from Vellore Institute of Technology.

news.title:
Puravankara's subsidiary Starworth wins ₹280.35 crore construction contract.
The project duration is set at 24 months.
news.summary:
Puravankara's subsidiary Starworth wins ₹280.35 crore construction contract.
The project duration is set at 24 months.

news.title:
Puravankara secures Rs 280.35-cr VIT construction order to be executed in 24 months.
Q3 FY26 net profit at Rs 59.3 cr, revenue up 236.1% YoY; shares fell 0.4% to Rs 179.1.
news.summary:
Puravankara secures Rs 280.35-cr VIT construction order to be executed in 24 months.
Q3 FY26 net profit at Rs 59.3 cr, revenue up 236.1% YoY; shares fell 0.4% to Rs 179.1.

news.title:
Puravankara enters joint development for 4-acre land on Hennur Road, Bengaluru.
Project GDV exceeds Rs 1,300 crore; saleable area is approx. 0.84 million sq.ft.
news.summary:
Puravankara enters joint development for 4-acre land on Hennur Road, Bengaluru.
Project GDV exceeds Rs 1,300 crore; saleable area is approx. 0.84 million sq.ft.

news.title:
Puravankara plans real estate launches worth ₹18,000 Cr, indicating sector growth.
Ashish Puravankara highlights business strategies amid real estate boom.
news.summary:
Puravankara plans real estate launches worth ₹18,000 Cr, indicating sector growth.
Ashish Puravankara highlights business strategies amid real estate boom.

news.title:
Puravankara launches Purva Silversky, a premium housing project in Bengaluru with GDV of ₹1000-₹1200 crore.
The company's current market capitalization is ₹5500 crore.
news.summary:
Puravankara launches Purva Silversky, a premium housing project in Bengaluru with GDV of ₹1000-₹1200 crore.
The company's current market capitalization is ₹5500 crore.

news.title:
Puravankara Ltd allots 1,500 NCDs worth INR 150 Cr in third tranche.
Total approved fund raising is up to INR 300 Cr; NCDs mature in June 2025.
news.summary:
Puravankara Ltd allots 1,500 NCDs worth INR 150 Cr in third tranche.
Total approved fund raising is up to INR 300 Cr; NCDs mature in June 2025.

news.title:
Puravankara Ltd reports Q3FY26 PAT of Rs.58.5 Cr.
Revenue growth noted; Rs.4,700 Cr project launches planned.
news.summary:
Puravankara Ltd reports Q3FY26 PAT of Rs.58.5 Cr.
Revenue growth noted; Rs.4,700 Cr project launches planned.

news.title:
Puravankara posted a Q3 EBITDA gain of 2.2B INR vs a 180M INR loss YoY.
The company's Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 20.6%.
news.summary:
Puravankara posted a Q3 EBITDA gain of 2.2B INR vs a 180M INR loss YoY.
The company's Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 20.6%.

news.title:
Puravankara Ltd received MahaRERA registration for 'Purva Estrella' in Andheri, Mumbai.
The residential project launches on February 20, 2026, catering to the domestic market.
news.summary:
Puravankara Ltd received MahaRERA registration for 'Purva Estrella' in Andheri, Mumbai.
The residential project launches on February 20, 2026, catering to the domestic market.

news.title:
Puravankara Ltd schedules an analyst/investor meet on Feb 13, 2026, to discuss 3Q and 9M FY26 results.
Key executives, including MD Ashish Puravankara, will present; no unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared.
news.summary:
Puravankara Ltd schedules an analyst/investor meet on Feb 13, 2026, to discuss 3Q and 9M FY26 results.
Key executives, including MD Ashish Puravankara, will present; no unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared.

news.title:
Puravankara Ltd has issued a corporate guarantee of Rs. 440 crore for its subsidiary, Purva Oak Pvt Ltd, towards NCDs.
This guarantee is a contingent liability and has no immediate impact on Puravankara's financials.
news.summary:
Puravankara Ltd has issued a corporate guarantee of Rs. 440 crore for its subsidiary, Purva Oak Pvt Ltd, towards NCDs.
This guarantee is a contingent liability and has no immediate impact on Puravankara's financials.

news.title: Puravankara reports strong Q3 performance and anticipates a robust H2 FY26.
news.summary: Puravankara reports strong Q3 performance and anticipates a robust H2 FY26.
